diffCoverage.notes: Change spans types -> store -> command, all within the forward-only order. No layer added, renamed, or reordered; no ADR needed.

findings.evidence: ThreadIdentity is added to the types layer (pure data, camelCase, no rusqlite). backfill_thread_identities lives in the store layer and keeps rusqlite confined there (prepared UPDATE inside a transaction). command/ list_contacts/list_groups depend downward on store + types only and call the store through the typed function via the injected StoreState — the Tauri IPC argument shape (accountId) is unchanged, so the frontend needs no change. Forward-only dependency direction (command -> store -> types) is preserved.

summary: Architecture review: the avatar/title persistence fix is applied at the correct seams — a pure DTO in types, an UPDATE-only repository function in store (rusqlite confined), and a best-effort backfill call from command after the directory fetch. No layer boundary moved and no IPC contract changed. Forward-only layering intact. Approve.
